title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Hindustan Petroleum - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Hindustan Petroleum - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Hindustan Petroleum is actively seeking a talented and motivated Process Engineer to join our dynamic team in Thane. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Hindustan Petroleum:
Hindustan Petroleum is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in TPM

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hindustan Petroleum!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
